benchmark._comment_agent_key: agent_key is ALWAYS the agent id (the 'agent:' prefix stripped) - it is derived from agent_id, so any value you type here is ignored. agent_label is the display name only. The launcher writes this block when you connect an agent; you never hand-pick the key.
benchmark._comment_v2: APPEND MODE (v2): 'agents' above is now the CATALOG the launcher offers when you CREATE a benchmark. The named per-agent benchmarks + their question membership + the 'redo at next run' flags live below in 'benchmarks' (the launcher writes them; you do NOT edit this by hand). 'run_request' is written by the launcher just before it fires the Run_Benchmark scenario - leave it null here. Both start empty.
